package rulecoverage

func PositiveCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwner() string {
    ruleID := "commit_or_rollback_split_across_functions_without_owner"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Transaction end-state logic spread across helper functions with unclear ownership."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
